steps.assistant_text: 27-insn G_FILLRECT DL builder. IDO emits the entry[0]/entry[1] computation 'or' instructions in opposite order from target. INSN_PATCH at offsets 0x58/0x5C swaps them. Per docs/POST_CC_RECIPES.md#feedback-insn-patch-for-ido-codegen-caps.

metadata.verification: byte-exact via INSN_PATCH (2-insn or-swap at offsets 0x58/0x5C). Verified via mips-linux-gnu-objcopy --only-section=.text on build/.o vs expected/.o.
